name: Braille Energy Systems Inc.
summary: Braille Energy Systems Inc. manufactures and supplies ultra-lightweight lithium-ion batteries to the professional motor sports, transportation, marine, unmanned aerial vehicles, avionics, mining, medical, military, rail, back up/stand by, and audio industries. It provides carbon fiber race batteries. The company offers its products through a network of retail outlets in the United States and internationally, as well as through online distributors. The company is headquartered in Kingston, Canada.
